title: Automation in Forms if a label is chosen (not changed to), it moves that item to another group on the board
excerpt: Right now, the only option is  if a label/status changes it can move the item to a new group. But when using forms it would be very useful if someone chooses “Product A” and hits submit, then it goes to a specific group …

posts.author: robins (Robin Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, the only option is if a label/status changes it can move the item to a new group. But when using forms it would be very useful if someone chooses “Product A” and hits submit, then it goes to a specific group in the board and if they choose “Product B” and hits submit, it goes to a different group.

The automation currently doesn’t think that the items being created by the form with the label/status already there counts as it changing.
